title: Select and prepare motor sport competition vehicle tyres and wheels
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Select and prepare motor sport competition vehicle tyres and wheels demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine and select competition vehicle tyres and wheels

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Supplementary regulations and component supplier specifications are sourced and interpreted to gain a competitive advantage1.3 Specifications are checked against required operating conditions to determine tyre and wheel requirements 1.4 Tyre and wheel assemblies to be used are selected according to job requirements, and are documented and reported to appropriate personnel as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Supplementary regulations and component supplier specifications are sourced and interpreted to gain a competitive advantage1.3 Specifications are checked against required operating conditions to determine tyre and wheel requirements 1.4 Tyre and wheel assemblies to be used are selected according to job requirements, and are documented and reported to appropriate personnel as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Supplementary regulations and component supplier specifications are sourced and interpreted to gain a competitive advantage1.3 Specifications are checked against required operating conditions to determine tyre and wheel requirements 1.4 Tyre and wheel assemblies to be used are selected according to job requirements, and are documented and reported to appropriate personnel as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine and select competition vehicle tyres and wheels

elements.title: Prepare for mounting work

pcs.text: Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 2.2 Work area is cleaned and laid out according to job and team requirements2.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed according to safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 2.2 Work area is cleaned and laid out according to job and team requirements2.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed according to safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 2.2 Work area is cleaned and laid out according to job and team requirements2.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed according to safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for mounting work

elements.title: Mount tyre and wheel assembly to vehicle

pcs.text: Mounting surfaces and threaded components are cleaned, checked for damage, and treated as required3.2 Tyre and wheel assemblies are selected from stock according to markings and checked against criteria for event3.3 Tyre and wheel assemblies are inspected for serviceability according to manufacturer and team procedures 3.4 Selected tyres and wheels are mounted to vehicle according to manufacturer specifications and procedures and safety requirements3.5 Fasteners are tensioned according to component supplier specifications, and fastener locking device is engaged as required according to safety requirements3.6 Accurate and complete fitting is checked during and after installation according to manufacturer and team procedures3.7 Problems with tyre and wheel assemblies are reported to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mounting surfaces and threaded components are cleaned, checked for damage, and treated as required3.2 Tyre and wheel assemblies are selected from stock according to markings and checked against criteria for event3.3 Tyre and wheel assemblies are inspected for serviceability according to manufacturer and team procedures 3.4 Selected tyres and wheels are mounted to vehicle according to manufacturer specifications and procedures and safety requirements3.5 Fasteners are tensioned according to component supplier specifications, and fastener locking device is engaged as required according to safety requirements3.6 Accurate and complete fitting is checked during and after installation according to manufacturer and team procedures3.7 Problems with tyre and wheel assemblies are reported to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mounting surfaces and threaded components are cleaned, checked for damage, and treated as required3.2 Tyre and wheel assemblies are selected from stock according to markings and checked against criteria for event3.3 Tyre and wheel assemblies are inspected for serviceability according to manufacturer and team procedures 3.4 Selected tyres and wheels are mounted to vehicle according to manufacturer specifications and procedures and safety requirements3.5 Fasteners are tensioned according to component supplier specifications, and fastener locking device is engaged as required according to safety requirements3.6 Accurate and complete fitting is checked during and after installation according to manufacturer and team procedures3.7 Problems with tyre and wheel assemblies are reported to appropriate personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Mount tyre and wheel assembly to vehicle

elements.title: Conduct pre-race tyre and wheel preparation

pcs.text: Recommended cold tyre inflation pressures and optimum operating pressure requirements are sourced and interpreted4.2 Tyre inflation pressures are set to specifications according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements4.3 Base line tyre temperature and ambient and traction surface temperatures are measured and documented4.4 Tyres are buffed, if specified, according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and environmental requirements4.5 Tyre warmers are fitted and turned on, if specified and allowed, according to manufacturer and team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recommended cold tyre inflation pressures and optimum operating pressure requirements are sourced and interpreted4.2 Tyre inflation pressures are set to specifications according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements4.3 Base line tyre temperature and ambient and traction surface temperatures are measured and documented4.4 Tyres are buffed, if specified, according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and environmental requirements4.5 Tyre warmers are fitted and turned on, if specified and allowed, according to manufacturer and team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recommended cold tyre inflation pressures and optimum operating pressure requirements are sourced and interpreted4.2 Tyre inflation pressures are set to specifications according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements4.3 Base line tyre temperature and ambient and traction surface temperatures are measured and documented4.4 Tyres are buffed, if specified, according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and environmental requirements4.5 Tyre warmers are fitted and turned on, if specified and allowed, according to manufacturer and team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Conduct pre-race tyre and wheel preparation

elements.title: Conduct post-race tyre and wheel maintenance

pcs.text: Tyre pressures and temperatures are checked, tyre contact surface is analysed for handling and wear indications, and data is recorded according to team procedures5.2 Driver or rider is questioned for assessment of vehicle handling characteristics and data is recorded according to team procedures5.3 Additional data is sourced as required, and corresponding changes to tyres and wheels required for next race are determined5.4 Tyres are changed to different compound or pattern as required and according to manufacturer specifications and team procedures5.5 Removed tyres are tagged or marked for data audit trail according to team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tyre pressures and temperatures are checked, tyre contact surface is analysed for handling and wear indications, and data is recorded according to team procedures5.2 Driver or rider is questioned for assessment of vehicle handling characteristics and data is recorded according to team procedures5.3 Additional data is sourced as required, and corresponding changes to tyres and wheels required for next race are determined5.4 Tyres are changed to different compound or pattern as required and according to manufacturer specifications and team procedures5.5 Removed tyres are tagged or marked for data audit trail according to team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tyre pressures and temperatures are checked, tyre contact surface is analysed for handling and wear indications, and data is recorded according to team procedures5.2 Driver or rider is questioned for assessment of vehicle handling characteristics and data is recorded according to team procedures5.3 Additional data is sourced as required, and corresponding changes to tyres and wheels required for next race are determined5.4 Tyres are changed to different compound or pattern as required and according to manufacturer specifications and team procedures5.5 Removed tyres are tagged or marked for data audit trail according to team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Conduct post-race tyre and wheel maintenance

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Tyres are packed and stored according to team procedures6.2 Tyre and wheel stock inventory is assessed, documented and reported to appropriate personnel6.3 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected6.4 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures6.5 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace and team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tyres are packed and stored according to team procedures6.2 Tyre and wheel stock inventory is assessed, documented and reported to appropriate personnel6.3 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected6.4 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures6.5 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace and team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tyres are packed and stored according to team procedures6.2 Tyre and wheel stock inventory is assessed, documented and reported to appropriate personnel6.3 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected6.4 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures6.5 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace and team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
